description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of swept-back wings mounted at a low position on the body. The wings feature small blue-tipped winglets, and the tail assembly consists of a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both colored blue. Two cylindrical turbofan engines are mounted under the wings, one on each side. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, with a set of blue-tinted windows wrapping around the nose. The airplane's exterior is primarily light gray, with blue accents on the tail, winglets, and cockpit windows.
description: A sleek, light gray commercial jet airplane with blue-tipped wings, blue tail, and underwing engines. The cockpit features blue-tinted windows at the front.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the blue tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan with blue-tipped winglets.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the blue tail, underwing engine, and blue-tipped wing and cockpit windows.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit windows, both engines, and the full wingspan with blue tips.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the blue tail, underwing engine, and blue-tipped wing and cockpit windows.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and small upward winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear configuration; main and nose gear units implied but not visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with blue-tinted windows wrapping around the nose.
